title: erigeron capillipes
intro: Erigeron capillipes, also known as the Korean fleabane or Korean daisy, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Erigeron capillipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
